title: sparganium erectum nothosubsp. oocarpum
intro: Sparganium erectum nothosubsp. oocarpum, also known as bur-reed, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Typhaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of bur-reed include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of bur-reed can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including colds, flu, and skin conditions.
